parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS asset_id,
  a.asset_type,
  a.template_name,
  a.avatar_id,
  a.background_id,
  a.placements,
  a.script_text,
  wp.client_id,
  wp.theme_name,
  wp.status AS plan_status,
  c.name AS client_name,
  c.slug AS client_slug
FROM assets a
JOIN weekly_plans wp ON a.plan_id = wp.id
JOIN clients c ON wp.client_id = c.id
WHERE a.plan_id = '{{ $json.body.plan_id }}'::uuid
  AND a.included = true
  AND (a.asset_type = 'video' OR a.asset_type IS NULL)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $json.client_id, template_id: $json.template_id, avatar_id: $json.avatar_id, background_id: $json.background_id, ratios: $json.ratios, platforms: $json.platforms, email: $json.email, source: $json.source, asset_id: $json.asset_id }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: false, message: 'No video assets found for this plan' } }}
